meaning: n.芬兰马克(芬兰的货币单位)
examples: Set in Finnmark, the largest and northernmost county in Norway, it opens its doors every January until it melts away in early spring.
Modest certainly, but cheering nevertheless when set against the overall drop in Finnmark's population.
The North Cape is found in a barren, dry and mostly uninhabited area of Norway called Finnmark, an alarmingly desolate town.
Another new rule decrees that the boats taking tourists around Finnmark's rivers in the summer must be fitted with powerful lights.
